description: You are a Clinical Data Manager at Beacon Oncology. The FDA has cleared IND-154892 and the first patient arrives at Memorial Research Center on March 1, 2025. The EDC system has not yet been configured for this trial. Log into OpenClinica (username: root, password: Admin123!) and perform the complete study activation. Create a new study with Unique Protocol ID 'ONC-301', Brief Title 'Beacon NSCLC Phase III', Principal Investigator 'Dr. James Morrison', Protocol Type 'Interventional', Sponsor 'Beacon Oncology Inc.', Expected Total Enrollment '120', and Facility 'Memorial Research Center' in Boston, Massachusetts, United States. Define three study events: 'Screening' (Scheduled, non-repeating), 'Baseline Assessment' (Scheduled, non-repeating), and 'Cycle 1 Day 1' (Scheduled, non-repeating). Upload the Vital Signs CRF template from /home/ga/vital_signs_crf.xls and assign it as a required CRF for all three events. Create a site named 'Memorial Research Center' with Protocol ID 'MRC-001' under this study. Enroll the first subject with Study Subject ID 'ONC-001' (Male, Date of Birth: 1965-08-14) at the Memorial Research Center site. Schedule their Screening visit for 03/01/2025. Open the Screening visit Vital Signs CRF, enter the values from the source document at /home/ga/source_docs/ONC001_screening.txt, and mark the CRF as complete.
